channel.title: ai on Jonathan Ma
channel.description: Recent content in ai on Jonathan Ma

item.title: Chatbots Are Not For Everyone
item.description: Why Chatbots provide a zero-knowledge interface to clients. They can just ask what they want and get a human-like reply, rather than bolts and buttons. Examples Several good examples of chatbots are: Cleverbot, Microsoft’s Zo and even Tencent’s Baby Q How to Build One? To build chatbots, you can take two approaches: Build with an existing bot framework Build it from scratch Examples for (1) would be Wit.ai, Api.
